fact_nuggets.text: Air Lock (Japanese: Air Lock) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. It is the signature Ability of Rayquaza.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Changes the weather to clear. MD T D S Changes the weather to a clear condition. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD It changes the floor to have ineffective weather! MD RT DX This Ability causes the floor to have Ineffective Weather, removing the effects of weather.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation V 1.1.2 Generation VI 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Air Lock is in battle, all effects of weather are negated (though the weather itself does not disappear). Generation V [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Air Lock is brought out, the message " The effects of weather disappeared. " will be displayed after the Ability is announced. Generation VI [ edit | edit source ] During extremely harsh sunlight , heavy rain , and strong winds , even if a Pokemon is negating the effects of weather with Air Lock, the moves Sunny Day , Rain Dance , Sandstorm , and Hail will still fail if used, and the Abilities Drought , Drizzle , Sand Stream , and Snow Warning will still fail to activate. However, all other effects of these weather conditions are negated by Air Lock. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Air Lock has no effect outside of battle.

Generation V [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Air Lock is brought out, the message " The effects of weather disappeared. " will be displayed after the Ability is announced. Generation VI [ edit | edit source ] During extremely harsh sunlight , heavy rain , and strong winds , even if a Pokemon is negating the effects of weather with Air Lock, the moves Sunny Day , Rain Dance , Sandstorm , and Hail will still fail if used, and the Abilities Drought , Drizzle , Sand Stream , and Snow Warning will still fail to activate. However, all other effects of these weather conditions are negated by Air Lock.
Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
